m: Servant of the Source of Peace
Servant of the Guardian of Faith
Servant of the Fashioner of Forms
Servant of the Giver of Life
Servant of the Taker of Life
Servant of the Acceptor of Repentance
He who follows at the heel
One who shows the right way
Father of the young camel; first caliph
High above, first martyr in Islam
Daughter of Asad, mother of Ali
One who distinguishes truth from falsehood
Gate of paradise for fasting people
Harm (as a name - one who harms enemies)
One who strives in the way of God
One who distinguishes right from wrong
One who shows the right way
Criterion, distinction between right and wrong
Wrapped in garments, one who is covered
Comforter, wife of Pharaoh who was righteous
Lover, one who is in love
Repentant, one who turns to God
Mother of Hani, cousin of Prophet
Lightning, the creature of the Prophet's night journey
